reviews.comment:
Es un buen lugar para parar un rato, lo que más destaco, es la pulcritud de sus baños

(Translated by Google)
It's a good place to stop for a while; what I appreciate most is the cleanliness of its bathrooms.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5aUphbFJ3EAE

reviews.comment:
El baño parecía trinchera de la primera guerra mundial; un asco. Vergüenza debería darles. Otra que Covid te agarras en este lugar.

(Translated by Google)
The bathroom looked like a World War I trench; disgusting. They should be ashamed. You'd catch Covid in this place.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5aU5yTEh3EAE

reviews.comment:
Horroroso el estado del baño de damas!!!
Sucio, sin jabon, sin papel y los inodoros mugrientos, no voy a describirlo pero es vomitivo. Una vergüenza que estén abiertos.
Alli no moris de Covid, te agarra una infeccion muy probablemente

(Translated by Google)
The state of the women's restroom is horrendous!!!
Dirty, no soap, no toilet paper, and filthy toilets. I won't describe it, but it's disgusting. It's a shame they're even open.
You won't die of Covid there; you'll most likely get an infection.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5aU5xcDlRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Un parador muy tranquilo, donde se disfruta el pequeño descanso. Las instalaciones impecables.

(Translated by Google)
A very peaceful inn, perfect for enjoying a short break. The facilities are spotless.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5NE83MEVBEAE

Good service.

reviews.comment:
Buena atención pero los baños podrían estar un poquitito más limpios y cierta gente no ser tan sucia y cuidar el lugar donde van, ya que los demás también tienen que ir.

(Translated by Google)
Good service, but the bathrooms could be a little cleaner, and some people should be less messy and take care of the place they go, since others have to go there too.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5b0kyWmVnEAE
